articles.title: NASA and SpaceX disagree about manual controls for lunar lander - Ars Technica

articles.content:
Advanced cooling design for peak performance 
A cutting-edge cooling system enables the ASUS NUC 16 Pro to maintain consistent performance. Dual-exhaust CPU fansii, three heat pipes, and fin arrays … [+1422 chars]
